trust_boundary.reliance_statement: This adapter describes a simulated MCP gateway evidence shape. ProofRail does not treat the gateway as a trust authority.

control_surface.description: Simulated MCP gateway decision event stream observed at the controlled actuation path.

decision_event.description: Simulated gateway emits a structured decision event per protected tool call attempt.

bypass_evidence.description: Records direct-call or off-path attempts observed by the gateway or adjacent monitor.

revocation_status.description: Records policy or authority revocation check result at decision time.

subject_hashes.description: Source exposes SHA-256 of policy snapshot, decision payload, or selected evidence subjects.

source_identity.description: Source identity is declared by gateway deployment metadata; this is not a trust decision.

timestamp_integrity.description: Gateway records event timestamps; v0.2.6 does not verify clock trust.

normalization_notes: Maps gateway decision values to ProofRail allow/deny-style decision observations.
Maps gateway reason codes to a free-form normalized reason string.
Does not assert source event authenticity or completeness.

adapter_limitations: Static descriptor only; no real MCP gateway integration.
Does not prove source event authenticity.
Does not assert that the gateway is correctly deployed in any environment.
non_claims: This adapter is not a certification.
This adapter does not make the gateway a trust authority.
This adapter does not assert that any real gateway product is conformant.
